title: Dynamic Content Moderation in Livestreams: Combining Supervised Classification with MLLM-Boosted Similarity Matching
abstract_zh: 提出双路径混合架构，监督分类路径处理已知违规，MLLM蒸馏相似度路径处理新兴违规，三模态（text/audio/visual）融合，生产部署验证。
abstract_en: Dual-path hybrid architecture combining supervised classification for known violations and MLLM-distilled similarity retrieval for novel violations, across text/audio/visual modalities, validated at production scale.
method_zh: 双路径：监督多类分类器 + 参考案例库检索（MLLM蒸馏轻量 re-ranker）。两路联合决策：分类路径覆盖高置信已知类，相似度路径检索参考违规案例捕获新兴违规。CLIP-loss对比预训练对齐三模态特征。
method_en: Dual-path: (1) supervised multi-class classifier for known violation categories, (2) MLLM-knowledge-distilled similarity re-ranker that retrieves against a reference case bank. Joint decision across both paths. CLIP-loss contrastive pre-training for cross-modal alignment.
innovation_zh: 检索路径解决新兴违规冷启动问题（只需补充案例，无需重训）；MLLM蒸馏大模型知识到轻量模型，保持生产级推理速度；三模态联合审核防止单模态规避。
innovation_en: Retrieval path solves cold-start for novel violations; MLLM teacher distillation compresses large model knowledge for production latency; tri-modal fusion prevents single-modality evasion.
metrics: Classification: 67% Recall@80% Precision; Similarity: 76% Recall@80% Precision; Hybrid significantly outperforms single-path baselines

title: Valley3: Scaling Omni Foundation Models for E-commerce
authors: Zeyu Chen, Guanghao Zhou, Qixiang Yin, Ziwang Zhao, Huanjin Yao, Pengjiu Xia, Min Yang, Cen Chen, Minghui Qiu
abstract_zh: 基于Qwen3-VL骨干扩展音频Transformer，通过四阶段电商连续预训练构建全感官电商大模型，支持可控推理模式和Agentic Search，覆盖文本/图片/视频/音频四模态。
abstract_en: Extends Qwen3-VL backbone with Audio Transformer, builds a full-sensory e-commerce MLLM via 4-stage continual pre-training, with controllable reasoning modes (0-3 thinking levels) and Agentic Search for deep research tasks.
method_zh: 架构：Qwen3-VL + Audio Transformer（音频嵌入通过MLP连接器对齐并拼接到统一序列）。四阶段训练：①音频理解 ②跨模态指令跟随 ③电商域知识注入 ④长上下文推理。后训练：GRPO强化可控推理；Agentic Search主动检索工具。
method_en: Architecture: Qwen3-VL + Audio Transformer (audio embeddings aligned via MLP connector). Four-stage training: audio understanding → cross-modal instruction following → e-commerce domain knowledge → long-context reasoning. Post-training: GRPO for controllable reasoning; Agentic Search for tool invocation.
innovation_zh: 首个原生多语言音频的电商Omni MLLM；可控推理三档平衡效率与深度；Agentic Search支持主动检索电商规则库实现AI原生电商助理。
innovation_en: First omni e-commerce MLLM with native multilingual audio; three-level controllable reasoning balances efficiency and depth; Agentic Search enables AI-native e-commerce assistant with tool invocation.
metrics: 6-task omni e-commerce benchmark: consistently outperforms strong baselines on in-house and open-source benchmarks; competitive on general domain benchmarks

title: Deja Vu in Plots: Leveraging Cross-Session Evidence with Retrieval-Augmented LLMs for Live Streaming Risk Assessment
authors: Yiran Qiao, Xiang Ao, Jing Chen, Yang Liu, Qiwei Zhong, Qing He
affiliation: 中国科学院计算技术研究所 (ICT, CAS)
abstract_zh: 提出CS-VAR，将RAG引入直播风险评估，从历史场次库检索相似违规场次，LLM推理跨场次行为模式，知识蒸馏迁移至轻量小模型用于实时部署。
abstract_en: CS-VAR applies RAG to live streaming risk assessment, retrieving cross-session behavioral evidence from a historical session bank, using LLM for structured cross-session reasoning, then distilling insights to a lightweight model for real-time deployment.
method_zh: CS-VAR：轻量域专用模型做快速session级风险推断，LLM教师检索历史跨场次证据做结构化推理，知识蒸馏将LLM的局部→全局洞察迁移到小模型。会话行为序列向量化支持语义检索。
method_en: CS-VAR: lightweight domain-specific model for fast session-level risk inference, guided by an LLM teacher that reasons over retrieved cross-session behavioral evidence. Knowledge distillation transfers local-to-global insights. Session actions vectorized for semantic retrieval.
innovation_zh: 首个跨场次RAG直播风险检测框架；识别"剧本重复"的诈骗模式；LLM教师→小模型蒸馏解决推理质量与延迟的矛盾。
innovation_en: First cross-session RAG framework for live streaming risk; captures recurring 'script' patterns of fraudulent actors; LLM teacher → small model distillation resolves quality-latency tradeoff.
metrics: State-of-the-art AUC and Precision@K on real platform data; small model supports real-time inference

title: Text-Guided Visual Representation Learning for Robust Multimodal E-Commerce Recommendation
abstract_zh: 针对电商图片噪声（促销贴纸、背景杂乱）提出TGQ-Former，以商品元数据为语义引导，双路Hybrid-Query Connector提取干净视觉token，DGVM自适应融合，提升I2I检索鲁棒性。
abstract_en: TGQ-Former addresses noisy product images (promotional overlays, cluttered backgrounds) by using structured metadata as semantic guidance for visual token extraction via dual-path Hybrid-Query Connector with Reliability-Aware Dual-Gated Vector Modulation (DGVM).
method_zh: 双路Hybrid-Query Connector：元数据引导路（锚定语义）+ 探索路（自由视觉）→ 可靠性感知双门控向量调制（DGVM）自适应融合两路 → 多模态商品嵌入 → I2I检索。冻结视觉编码器，只训练轻量连接器。
method_en: Dual-path Hybrid-Query Connector: metadata-anchored stream (semantic) + exploratory stream (visual) → DGVM adaptively calibrates contributions → multimodal item embedding → I2I retrieval. Vision encoder frozen; only lightweight connector trained.
innovation_zh: 元数据引导视觉token提取为电商噪声图片专属解法；DGVM动态去噪独特；冻结编码器+轻量连接器工业部署成本低。
innovation_en: Metadata-guided visual extraction tailored for noisy e-commerce images; DGVM dynamic denoising unique; frozen encoder + light connector enables low-cost industrial deployment.
metrics: Hit Rate@100 (H@100): +6.04% average improvement on large-scale real e-commerce full-pool I2I retrieval

title: RuleSafe-VL: Evaluating Rule-Conditioned Decision Reasoning in Vision-Language Content Moderation
abstract_zh: 构建93条原子规则+92个类型化规则关系的内容审核诊断框架，将VLM审核拆解为规则激活→交互恢复→决策充分性→结论解析四步链，系统评估VLM规则推理弱点。
abstract_en: Diagnostic framework with 93 atomic rules and 92 typed rule relations, decomposing VLM content moderation into a rule-conditioned decision chain: rule activation → interaction recovery → decision sufficiency → outcome resolution.
method_zh: 将复杂平台内容政策形式化为93条原子规则+92个类型化规则关系（AND/OR/Exception）。诊断任务链4步：①规则激活识别 ②规则交互恢复 ③决策充分性判断 ④结论解析。系统评估当前VLM在每步的推理能力。
method_en: Formalizes platform policies into 93 atomic rules + 92 typed rule relations. 4-step diagnostic chain: (1) rule activation identification, (2) rule interaction recovery, (3) decision sufficiency, (4) outcome resolution. Systematically evaluates VLMs at each step.
innovation_zh: 从结果准确率转向推理链诊断，暴露VLM在跨规则交互推理的核心短板，为定向优化内审模型提供依据。
innovation_en: Shifts from outcome accuracy to reasoning-chain diagnostics, revealing that cross-rule interaction reasoning is the primary weakness of current VLMs.
metrics: Benchmark with 93 rules + 92 relations; majority of VLMs show significant performance drops on cross-rule interaction tasks

title: A General Framework for Multimodal LLM-Based Multimedia Understanding in Large-Scale Recommendation Systems
authors: Yiming Zhu, Xu Liu, Ziyun Xu, Zheng Wu et al.
abstract_zh: 提出离线MLLM多媒体语义提取+在线轻量特征消费的两阶段框架，解决MLLM在延迟敏感亿级item推荐系统中的部署挑战，Meta生产系统验证。
abstract_en: Offline MLLM multimedia extraction + online lightweight feature consumption framework, solving MLLM deployment challenges in latency-constrained billion-scale recommendation systems. Validated in Meta's production recommendation system.
method_zh: 两阶段：①离线MLLM批量提取多媒体（视频/图片）语义嵌入并缓存 ②在线推荐服务消费预提取的紧凑MLLM特征，满足延迟SLA。不同模态特征对齐到统一语义空间。
method_en: Two-stage: (1) offline MLLM batch extraction of multimedia semantic embeddings, cached in feature store; (2) online service consumes compact pre-extracted MLLM features under latency SLA. Cross-modal features aligned to unified semantic space.
innovation_zh: 将MLLM计算成本转移至离线阶段，在线服务只消费紧凑语义特征——电商平台MLLM落地的可行工程路径。Meta规模A/B测试验证。
innovation_en: Shifts MLLM compute to offline phase, enabling practical MLLM deployment in latency-constrained large-scale systems. Meta-scale A/B test validated.
metrics: Significant improvement in user engagement metrics in Meta's production recommendation system; meets industrial latency SLA

title: GLiGuard: Schema-Conditioned Classification for LLM Safeguard
authors: Urchade Zaratiana, Mary Newhauser, George Hurn-Maloney, Ash Lewis
abstract_zh: 0.3B双向编码器（GLiNER2改），schema token将任务定义和标签语义编码入输入序列，单次前向传播完成14类伤害+多安全维度并行分类，较7-27B自回归模型快16x、延迟低17x。
abstract_en: 0.3B bidirectional encoder (adapted from GLiNER2) with schema token encoding, enabling single-pass parallel classification of 14 harm categories and multiple safety dimensions, 16x faster and 17x lower latency than 7B-27B autoregressive guardrail models.
method_zh: 将任务定义和标签语义编码为schema token融入输入序列，双向编码器单次前向传播同时评估：prompt安全性/response安全性/拒绝检测/14细粒度伤害类别。避免自回归生成的串行开销。
method_en: Task definitions and label semantics encoded as schema tokens in input sequence; bidirectional encoder simultaneously evaluates prompt safety, response safety, refusal detection, and 14 harm categories in a single forward pass. Eliminates autoregressive sequential overhead.
innovation_zh: 将guardrail问题还原为判别分类；schema token支持零代码扩展新安全维度；16x速度提升使实时平台审核成为可能。
innovation_en: Reframes guardrail as discriminative classification; schema tokens enable zero-code extension to new safety categories; 16x speed makes real-time platform content review feasible.
metrics: 16x faster, 17x lower latency, 23-90x smaller than 7B-27B SOTA; comparable accuracy; 14 harm categories
